heading: Governing body
label: 70105 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70105(a)36:5606., , §§ 1806, 1807, 1808(g) (related to directors and officers), .Sept. 23, 1996Pub. L. 104–201, title XVIII110 Stat. 276170105(b)36:5607.70105(c)36:5608(g) (related to directors and officers).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State of Delaware” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (c), the words “The requirements for serving as a director or officer” are substituted for “in determining the requirements for serving on the board of directors or as an officer of the association” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70105(a)36:5606., , §§ 1806, 1807, 1808(g) (related to directors and officers), .Sept. 23, 1996Pub. L. 104–201, title XVIII110 Stat. 276170105(b)36:5607.70105(c)36:5608(g) (related to directors and officers).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State of Delaware” are omitted as unnecessary.In subsection (c), the words “The requirements for serving as a director or officer” are substituted for “in determining the requirements for serving on the board of directors or as an officer of the association” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the bylaws and articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the bylaws and articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for serving as a director or officer may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, disability, age, or national origin.
